message:
fix: CardRequestDialog concurrent submission + ratchet false-positive cleanup (#6778) (#6779)

- Change submittingProject single-string state to submittingProjects Set
  so concurrent submissions are tracked independently per project
- Rewrite 2 issue-ref comments from (#6772) to (issue 6772) to avoid
  hex-color false positives in the UI/UX standards scanner
- Lower ratchet baseline back from 306 to 304

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -350,7 +350,7 @@ After I approve, help me execute the repairs step by step.`, - {/* Error banner when cluster health fetch fails (#6772) */} + {/* Error banner when cluster health fetch fails (issue 6772) */} {healthError && (
